one: The API Service is designed to provide users with access to the conditions required for operations such as: Member management functions, report management functions, stock management functions, and payment functions. This document details how to access the system's API extension service.
seam4: This section provides details on how to use the Seamless system for external business partnerships.
work4: The introductory information shows how to call the API of a business partner system, ensuring that the system can access the API correctly under the specified conditions.
setting3: *If you have a primary account, please create an API agent account under your primary account and log in with the API agent account you created earlier. Then follow these setup steps:
setting4: Click the Account menu and select Profile.
setting32: You can add IP addresses by entering them in the Callback field
setting33: Click the “Save” button to save your changes
setting44: You can append parameters to the link (&lottotype=) to redirect players to specific Askmelotto betting pages.
setting45: Note : Please use the codes exactly as shown in the example.
setting453: When a player enters the homepage or other pages of the Askmelotto system, the system will send a request to retrieve the player's actual profile details.
setting4521: When a player enters the homepage or other pages of the Askmelotto system, the system will send a request to retrieve the player's actual balance.
setting4522: When a player places a bet, the Askmelotto system will send a 'UserPlaceBet' request to the partner's system. The request will timeout after 10 seconds and trigger a 'PlaceBetCancel'.
setting4541: Used for cancellation when 'UserPlaceBet' fails or times out.
setting4542: Used for cancellation when requested by the player.
setting4543: In case of full ticket cancellation, the ticket status will be 'Cancel', and the 'betStatus' for every individual bet within that ticket will also be 'Cancel'.
setting4544: If individual numbers are canceled, the ticket status remains 'Success', but the canceled items will have a 'betStatus' of 'Cancel'.
setting4545: When results are announced, the Askmelotto system will send a 'UserPlacePayout' request.
setting4561: In case of incorrect result entry, the Askmelotto system will send a 'UserPlaceReToRunning' request and then re-process the results.
